text: Hahaha great idea to film this for TikTok. We love our nex!
text_zh: 哈哈哈，拍这个视频放 TikTok 上真是个好主意。我们很爱我们的 nex！

text: This would just cause a fight in my house cause we’re all so competitive 😂😂
text_zh: 这在我们家肯定会引发争吵，因为我们都太好胜了😂😂

text: just don't play Overcooked you'll end up divorced
text_zh: 千万别玩 Overcooked，不然你们会离婚的

text: Now I feel old in Wii years 😅
text_zh: 现在感觉自己在 Wii 年份里都老了 😅

text: So funny, idk what you’re even doing
text_zh: 太搞笑了，我都不知道你在干嘛

text: Imma do it too
text_zh: 我也要这么做

text: We’d kill each other
text_zh: 我们会打起来的

text: When they get just dance I’ll get it🤣😭
text_zh: 等出了Just Dance我就买🤣😭

text: this is me and my wife, I recommend it man,we laughed while we play and take breaks and sips of alcohol 🍸
text_zh: 我和我老婆就是这样， man，我推荐这个，我们一边玩一边笑，还会休息一下，喝点酒 🍸

text: Ok so adults can play this game I need! 😅
text_zh: 好吧，大人也可以玩这个游戏，我需要！😅

text: wii
text_zh: Wii

text: I got this for my grandchildren last year to keep them moving over the winter months. I honestly believe that my daughter and son in law like it more. Great investment.
text_zh: 我去年给我孙子孙女买的，让他们在冬天也能多动动。我 honestly 觉得我女儿和我女婿比他们还喜欢。太值了。

text: Looks like a good date night!
text_zh: 看起来是个不错的约会之夜！

text: Great idea!
text_zh: 好主意！

text: yes!! we game every night once the kids are down. we have our own and and games we play together 💕 currently running Zelda side by side sharing tips on shrines 🤣
text_zh: 对！！孩子们睡了之后我们每晚都玩。我们有自己的设备和游戏，一起玩 💕 现在一边玩塞尔达一边分享神庙攻略 🤣

text: the Kinect was 15 years ago >.>
text_zh: Kinect 是 15 年前了 >.<

text: I have one and I love it
text_zh: 我有一个，我爱死它了！

text: My daughter and I KILL on Starry! Love that game!! Kiddos love wack a mole. I agree everyone should have one! And the 1year membership is really reasonable
text_zh: 我女儿和我特别会玩Starry！爱死那个游戏了！！孩子们也爱打地鼠。我同意每个人都应该有一个！一年的会员费真的很合理

text: Love this idea!!!
text_zh: 喜欢这个主意！！！

text: BRILLIANT!
text_zh: 太棒了！

text: Lowkey looks fun !
text_zh: 低调地看起来很好玩！

text: Adding this to our nights!!
text_zh: 晚上加这个到我们活动里！！

text: Okay I need this for my family!
text_zh: 好的，我需要这个给我家人！

text: This is great. There is nothing on tv
text_zh: 这太棒了。电视上什么都没有

text: Playing games together is super fun! Great reminder!
text_zh: 一起玩游戏超有趣！很棒的提醒！

text: I need one of these just for me
text_zh: 我需要一个，就我自己用的

text: That’s a great ideal!
text_zh: 这真是个好主意！

text: Not just for kids!
text_zh: 不只是给孩子玩的！

text: “50% off, Max $12 off” 🧐
text_zh: “打五折，最高优惠 12 美元” 🧐

text: I want one of these so bad!!!
text_zh: 我太想要一个这个了！！！

text: this is more like the Xbox Kinect than the Wii. I really want one. used to love the Kinect
text_zh: 这更像 Xbox Kinect，不是 Wii。我真的很想要一个。以前很喜欢 Kinect

text: Got my daughter one for Christmas and I think it’s more for me than her 😂
text_zh: 圣诞节给我女儿买了一个，结果我觉得我比她玩得还多 😂

text: I just told the hubs we should get that! 🤭
text_zh: 我刚告诉老公我们应该买一个！🤭

text: I’m about to get it for me and my husband
text_zh: 我准备给我和我老公买一个

text: that 50% off coupon definitely doesn't work 😂 I've been wanting this
text_zh: 那个 50% 的折扣券肯定不好使 😂 我一直想买这个

text: classic date night
text_zh: 经典的约会之夜

text: We play switch
text_zh: 我们玩Switch

text: Just love you
text_zh: 就是喜欢你

text: I still have my Wii and Kinect 😁
text_zh: 我还有我的Wii和Kinect 😁

text: aww so cute!!!
text_zh: 哇，好可爱！！！

text: Bruh we play games and have something playing in the background. This doesn’t solve my issue of what needs to be playing in the background 😂
text_zh: 哥们，我们玩游戏的时候会放点东西在背景里。这个解决不了我需要背景播放东西的问题😂

text: My husband and I are going to do this with my kids switch 😂😂
text_zh: 我老公和我准备和我孩子一起玩这个 Switch 😂😂

text: Haha love it!
text_zh: 哈哈，太喜欢了！

text: It says 50% off but it’s still $250. Or are you doing an American sale where you mark it up first then put it on “sale”?
text_zh: 写着打五折，结果还是 250 美元。还是说你们美国那边是先抬价再打折？

text: We have switch and love it❣
text_zh: 我们有switch，很喜欢❣

text: Which game are this? This looks very interesting. I need to do this with my husband.
text_zh: 这是什么游戏？看起来很有意思。我得和我老公一起玩。

text: This is just a new age wii
text_zh: 这不就是新时代的 Wii 吗

text: Lots of these ads today
text_zh: 今天好多这种广告

text: My husband and I have been playing overcooked 1 &2 on Xbox for years! Such good bonding!
text_zh: 我和我老公在 Xbox 上玩 Overcooked 1 和 2 很多年了！很好的增进感情的方式！

text: Great idea and keeps you active
text_zh: 好主意，而且能让你保持活跃

text: Okay sold !
text_zh: 好吧，买了！

text: Okay I think this will be my husbands Christmas gift (selfishly I want it lol)
text_zh: 好吧，我觉得这会是我老公的圣诞礼物（我好想自己留着用哈哈）

text: is this like the old school wi?
text_zh: 这跟以前的Wii差不多吗？

text: I think this is a good idea
text_zh: 我觉得这是个好主意

text: let's try it.. worst case they kids will enjoy it
text_zh: 试试吧…最坏的情况就是孩子们会喜欢

text: What do you need for this? Where do we find it?
text_zh: 这个需要什么？在哪里可以找到？

text: I got my son one for his birthday last December and I play it just as much as him!
text_zh: 我去年12月给我儿子买了一个作为生日礼物，我玩得和他一样多！

text: this was the best date night we've had. worth it.
text_zh: 这是我们过得最棒的一次约会之夜了，值！

text: Mario Kart at house lol there’s tears sometimes but it’s worth it.
text_zh: 在家玩马里奥赛车哈哈，有时候会哭，但值得。

text: I absolutely love mine. My kids are obsessed it too. My favorites are the fitness games on it. We Zumba together consistently now! 🖤🖤
text_zh: 我太爱我的了。我孩子也超迷恋它。我最喜欢的是上面的健身游戏。我们现在经常一起跳尊巴！🖤🖤

text: I have this on my Xmas list for my daughter (the one we send grandparents) mostly bc I want this for myself hahaha
text_zh: 我把它列在我女儿的圣诞愿望清单上了（给爷爷奶奶买的那种），主要是因为我也想要哈哈哈哈

text: This cracks me up just watching this video. I’ve watched it two or three times already.
text_zh: 光看这个视频我就笑翻了。我看了两三遍了。

text: Not 50% lol
text_zh: 不是 50% 哦 lol

text: This sounds like so much fun!!
text_zh: 听起来太有趣了！！

text: nice date night idea at home love 🥰
text_zh: 在家约会的好主意，爱了🥰

text: My hubby and I have been doing this too
text_zh: 我老公和我一直在这么做

text: So smart exercise and fun! ❤
text_zh: 太聪明了，既能锻炼又能玩！❤

text: 😂 lol fun
text_zh: 😂 哈哈，好玩

text: Love this❣️❣️❣
text_zh: 爱死这个了❣️❣️❣

text: This is soooo cool
text_zh: 这个太酷了

text: That’s cool
text_zh: 那挺酷的

text: Looks fun 🥰
text_zh: 看起来很好玩 🥰

text: $250 is wild bro
text_zh: 250美元也太贵了吧哥

text: Oh my gosh this looks so fun
text_zh: 我的天哪，这看起来太好玩了

text: Genius
text_zh: 天才

text: Oh, that looks like too much like exercise. 😳😅😁
text_zh: 哦，这看起来太像运动了。😳😅😁

text: Or? And hear me out here. Go to the bedroom and make same movements under the sheets.
text_zh: 或者？听我说。去卧室，在床单下做同样的动作。

text: Started out as me fappin, ended with Mom banging on the bathroom door!
text_zh: 开始是我自己爽，最后老妈敲浴室门！

text: It’s cheaper at target I got mine for 175
text_zh: Target（一家美国零售商）更便宜，我175买的

text: @Brandon Cookson
text_zh: 布兰登·库克森

text: @Joseph Midjette
text_zh: @约瑟夫·米吉特

text: Just looked up for more information. You need to subscribe quarterly @ $49 or annually @ $80!!!!!
text_zh: 刚查了下更多信息。你需要每季度订阅 @ $49 或者每年订阅 @ $80！！！！！
